name: ven0m0-adblock
description: Comprehensive ad-blocking and web experience enhancement project with filter lists and userscripts

scripts.lint: bun run lint:js && bun run lint:filters && bun run lint:md
scripts.lint:js: bun run lint:biome && bun run lint:oxlint
scripts.lint:yaml: command -v yamllint >/dev/null && yamllint . || { echo 'yamllint not installed. Install with: pip install yamllint' >&2; exit 1; }
scripts.lint:fix: bun x oxlint --fix . && bun x biome check --write . && bun x aglint --fix
scripts.lint:fix:all: bun run lint:fix && bun run format
scripts.test: bun run lint && bun run format:check
scripts.test:ci: bun run lint && bun run format:check
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules dist lists/releases userscripts/dist Filters
scripts.clean:all: bun run clean && bun run clean:cache
scripts.validate: bun run test && bun run build

author: Ven0m0
